deptName: ช่างอากาศยาน
standardRef: EASA PART 66 MODULE 15 GAS TURBINE ENGINE
learningOutcomes:
Be able to understand, explain and apply knowledge in the systems of gas turbine
engine about Bearings and seals, Lubrication System, Lubricants and Fuel, Gas Turbine Engine
Fuel system, Engine Air system, Engine Starting and Ignition System, power augmentation
systems, Indication System and Turboprop engine Turboshaft Engine, Auxiliary Power Unit,
Power Plant remove and Installation, Engine Fire Protection, Engine Monitoring and Ground
Operation including engine preservation and Engine storage for workshop practice and have a
good attitude to work neatly, be patience with work, habit of working carefully and safety.
objectives:
1. Be able to understand the systems of gas turbine engine about Bearings and seals,
Lubrication System, Lubricants and Fuel, Gas Turbine Engine Fuel system, Engine Air system,
Engine Starting and Ignition System, power augmentation systems, Indication System and
Turboprop engine Turboshaft Engine, Auxiliary Power Unit, Power Plant remove and
Installation, Engine Fire Protection, Engine Monitoring and Ground Operation including engine
preservation and Engine storage.
2. Be able to explain the systems of gas turbine engine about Bearings and seals,
Lubrication System, Lubricants and Fuel, Gas Turbine Engine Fuel system, Engine Air system,
Engine Starting and Ignition System, power augmentation systems, Indication System and
Turboprop engine Turboshaft Engine, Auxiliary Power Unit, Power Plant remove and
Installation, Engine Fire Protection, Engine Monitoring and Ground Operation including engine
preservation and Engine storage.
3. Have a good attitude to work neatly, be patience with work, habit of working
carefully and safety.
4. Be able to apply knowledge in the systems of gas turbine engine about Bearings and
seals, Lubrication System, Lubricants and Fuel, Gas Turbine Engine Fuel system, Engine Air
system, Engine Starting and Ignition System, power augmentation systems, Indication System
and Turboprop engine Turboshaft Engine, Auxiliary Power Unit, Power Plant remove and
Installation, Engine Fire Protection, Engine Monitoring and Ground Operation including engine
preservation and Engine storage for workshop practice.
สาขาวิชาช’างอากาศยาน
competencies:
1. Describe and codify knowledge about the systems of gas turbine engine about
Bearings and seals, Lubrication System, Lubricants and Fuel, Gas Turbine Engine Fuel system,
Engine Air system, Engine Starting and Ignition System, power augmentation systems, Indication
System and Turboprop engine Turboshaft Engine, Auxiliary Power Unit, Power Plant remove
and Installation, Engine Fire Protection, Engine Monitoring and Ground Operation including
engine preservation and Engine storage.
2. Apply their knowledge for systems of gas turbine engine about Bearings and seals,
Lubrication System, Lubricants and Fuel, Gas Turbine Engine Fuel system, Engine Air system,
Engine Starting and Ignition System, power augmentation systems, Indication System and
Turboprop engine Turboshaft Engine, Auxiliary Power Unit, Power Plant remove and
Installation, Engine Fire Protection, Engine Monitoring and Ground Operation including engine
preservation and Engine storage in practical workshop.
3. Apply their knowledge of systems of gas turbine engine about Bearings and seals,
Lubrication System, Lubricants and Fuel, Gas Turbine Engine Fuel system, Engine Air system,
Engine Starting and Ignition System, power augmentation systems Indication System and
Turboprop engine Turboshaft Engine, Auxiliary Power Unit, Power Plant remove and
Installation, Engine Fire Protection, Engine Monitoring and Ground Operation including engine
preservation and Engine storage in higher education.
description:
To study and practice about Gas Turbine Engine Fuel system, Engine Air system, Engine
Starting and Ignition System, Engine Indication Systems, Power Augmentation Systems
Indication System and Turboprop engine, Turboshaft Engine, Auxiliary Power Unit, Power Plant
remove and Installation, Engine Fire Protection, Engine Monitoring and Ground Operation
including engine preservation and Engine storage.
